meta.title: Our first look at America's HYPERSONIC HACM Missile
meta.description:
The U.S. Air Force just gave us a peek at its new Hypersonic Attack Cruise Missile (HACM) that's slated to enter service in 2027. This scramjet-powered cruise missile is functionally very different from the hypersonic missiles already in service around the world, so let's briefly break it down.
